title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 379.341 - Exchange of information approved
text:
379.341.  Exchange of information approved. — Licensed rating organizations and admitted insurers are authorized to exchange information and experience data with rating organizations and insurers in this and other states and may consult with them with respect to ratemaking and the application of rating systems.
(L. 1972 S.B. 547 § 12)
